name: Sightless Tincture
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

With an incredibly deep black hue, sightless tincture is usually in wine, blood pudding, or other darkly colored foods. The oil at first faintly dims its victim's sight, then blacks it out entirely.

Saving Throw

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 14 hours

Stage 1 and a –2 status penalty to visual Perception checks (1 hour)

Stage 2 dazzled and a –4 status penalty to visual Perception checks (1 hour)

Stage 3 (2d6 hours); stage 3 is an incapacitation effect, and if the victim is still blinded from the poison when the poison has run its course, the blindness lasts for an additional 24 hours afterward
